name: snarl-sopi-backend
description: Snarl & Sopi operator backend — v5.18: lease inventory dashboard page (top-operator only) — summary by type, type/status filters + search, per-unit list with Free action, and a guarded Reset-to-baseline. Adds ag-admin routes POST /leases/units/:machineId/free and POST /leases/reseed (the existing secret-key /leases/free stays for the Zap). Builds on v5.17.
